name: Stuffed Chicken Rolls
recipeIngredient: 6 slices Paroscuro or ham, thinly sliced
6 slices low fat Swiss cheese, thinly sliced
1/2 cup white wine or Marsala wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts and cut them in half.
2. Place each chicken piece between two pieces of waxed paper and pound until slightly flattened.
3. Place 1 slice of prosciutto and 1 slice of cheese on each breast.
4. Roll up each chicken breast, securing with a toothpick if needed.
5. In a bowl, mix together the mushrooms, chicken stock, white wine or Marsala wine, ground rosemary, grated parmesan, cornstarch, Kitchen Bouquet, salt, pepper, and sugar (if using).
6. Dip each rolled chicken piece into the mixture, coating evenly.
7. Roll up in additional waxed paper to prevent sticking.
8. Cook as desired (e.g., pan-fry, bake, or grill).
